title: Trump says ceasefire ends Wednesday evening, extension 'highly unlikely'
snippet: Trump told Bloomberg the ceasefire ends Wednesday evening Washington time and it's 'highly unlikely' he'd extend it. Said 'I'm not going to be rushed into making a bad deal.' When asked if fighting resumes immediately: 'If there's no deal, I would certainly expect.' Hormuz stays blocked until agreement.
tag_reason: 신규 — 트럼프의 휴전 연장 거부 입장은 4/19까지 보도되지 않은 새로운 발언. 수요일 저녁 만료 확정 + 연장 불가 입장 첫 공식화.
